title: Grilled Saudi Lamb Kebabs
description: Charred, juicy lamb shoulder kebabs with Middle Eastern spices, perfect for a midnight craving.

ingredients.name: Lamb shoulder, trimmed, cut into 1.5 inch cubes

instructions: Preheat grill to high heat, about 250°C.
Soak wooden skewers in water for 30 minutes to prevent burning.
In a bowl, combine lamb cubes, olive oil, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, pepper, minced garlic, cilantro, and lemon juice; toss until all pieces are coated.
Let the marinated lamb rest for 45 minutes at room temperature to absorb flavors.
Thread lamb cubes onto soaked skewers, spacing them evenly.
Place skewers on the preheated grill and cook for 3 minutes per side, turning occasionally, until exterior is charred and interior is pink.
Remove skewers from grill and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Sprinkle additional chopped cilantro over the kebabs just before serving.
Serve with warm flatbread and a side of plain yogurt dip seasoned with cumin and salt.
Enjoy the juicy, charred lamb kebabs as a midnight craving indulgence.
